items.title: The Importance of Phase in Neural Representations: An Internal Oppenheim-Lim Test of Image Classifiers
items.title_cn: 相位在神经表征中的重要性：图像分类器的内部Oppenheim-Lim测试
items.summary: Oppenheim and Lim (1981) showed that natural images stay recognizable when reconstructed from their Fourier phase alone, while the magnitude carries little of their identity. We ask whether trained image classifiers reproduce this asymmetry inside their hidden layers, and we test it causally: given ...
items.summary_cn: Oppenheim和Lim （ 1981 ）表明，当仅从傅里叶相位重建时，自然图像仍然可以识别，而幅度几乎没有携带它们的身份。我们询问经过训练的图像分类器是否会在其隐藏层中再现这种不对称性，并进行因果测试：...
items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: HAMON: Passive Optical Sequence Mixing for Long-Horizon Forecasting
items.title_cn: HAMON ：用于长视野预测的无源光序列混合
items.summary: Simple linear and frequency-domain models remain surprisingly competitive in long-horizon time-series forecasting, and recent mechanistic evidence suggests that standard forecasting benchmarks may not require the dense superposed representations that make transformers powerful in other domains. This...
items.summary_cn: 简单的线性和频域模型在长时间序列预测中仍然具有令人惊讶的竞争力，最近的机理证据表明，标准预测基准可能不需要密集的叠加表示，这使得变压器在其他领域强大。...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: FusionRS: A Large-Scale RGB-Infrared Remote Sensing Dataset for Dual-Modal Vision-Language Foundation Models
items.title_cn: FusionRS ：用于双模态视觉语言基础模型的大规模RGB红外遥感数据集
items.summary: Remote sensing vision-language models have advanced Earth observation understanding, but most existing work remains centered on RGB imagery, leaving the complementary information in infrared data underexplored. Infrared images provide distinctive cues, including thermal intensity structures, object ...
items.summary_cn: 遥感视觉语言模型提高了对地球观测的理解，但大多数现有工作仍然以RGB图像为中心，使得红外数据中的补充信息未得到充分利用。红外图像提供了独特的线索，包括热强度结构、物体...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。
